daily.today_energy: You're giving main character energy today, Aquarius. The cosmos is nudging you toward authenticity—lean into whatever makes you feel most *you* right now. Trust the vibe shift.
daily.love: Someone's noticing your wavelength. Whether you're single or coupled, there's a magnetic quality to your presence today. Stay open, but don't force anything. Let connection happen naturally.
daily.career: Your unconventional ideas are your superpower today. Don't dim that light to fit in. Pitch that wild concept, speak up in meetings—the right people are listening and impressed.
daily.health: Your nervous system is calling for gentleness. Movement feels good today, but make it joyful—dancing, walking, stretching—whatever aligns with your energy rather than drains it.

weekly.overview: This week's energy feels like you're finally catching your breath after a long sprint. Mercury's moving in your favor, bringing clarity to situations that've felt foggy. Trust your gut—it's basically your personal AI this week.
weekly.love: Whether you're single or coupled up, authenticity is your love language right now. Stop overthinking the text back times and just show up as your messy, real self. Someone's definitely noticing.
weekly.career: Your ideas are hitting different this week—the kind that make people actually listen. Don't dim your light for anyone. This is your moment to pitch, propose, or pivot toward what actually excites you.
weekly.health: Your body's asking for balance, not punishment. Think nourishing rituals over rigid rules. A walk, some water, actual sleep—the boring stuff hits hard right now. Your energy will thank you.
